channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Social Security recipients may get a large COLA increase; here's how to earn 4% on savings
item.description: Social Security recipients could see a 4% COLA adjustment. Here's how to earn 4% on savings now.

item.title: Tuesday primaries test the influence of Trump's endorsement
Trump says he was "an hour away" from striking Iran
item.description: President Trump says he called off a planned attack on Iran at the request of Gulf allies as "serious negotiations" on a peace deal continue.

item.title: Busiest US commuter rail system to resume operations as deal reached to end strike
